subheadline: Need more than the catalog? Book the team that built all 255 elements. Fixed rates, no surprises — and Creator Care turns their help into a monthly habit.

items.title: Custom elements
items.description: A new Content Blocks element, built by the creators to the same audit rules as the other 255.

items.title: Creator Care
items.description: 4 dev hours, priority fixes, security monitoring, and LTS upgrade planning — every month.

items.title: Editor workshop
items.description: Remote onboarding that turns your editors loose on previews, the wizard, and per-page themes.

items.title: LTS upgrade
items.description: The creators move your site to the next TYPO3 LTS — planned, executed, regression-checked.
